## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with no errors
- [ ] Pages render and links/sidebar work locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Any documented CLI flags / metrics / drivers were verified against the
      [tool source](https://github.com/rconfig/rconfig-sim)
- [ ] New pages have unique `title` + `description` frontmatter
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
